blocks.text: glanced over at Julian when he laughed. She looked back at the fire quickly.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: I'm tired from the drive. That's all.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: You drove four hours. That's not nothing.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: I know you're fine. I'm just checking.
She smiled at him like she meant it. She probably did.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Come sit closer to the fire. It's getting cold.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: That's what you said twenty minutes ago.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: Then I'll be there in a minute.

blocks.prompt: What does Julian make of this exchange?

options.label: Two old friends. He looks out for her.
